bounties.english: In case of default, the lender reserves the right to liquidate assets.
bounties.translation: En caso de incumplimiento, el prestamista quemará el banco.
bounties.hallucination: Translated 'liquidate assets' as 'burn down the bank'
bounties.correct: En caso de incumplimiento, el prestamista se reserva el derecho de liquidar los activos.

bounties.english: Accounts with suspicious activity will be suspended immediately.
bounties.translation: Les comptes suspects recevront des croissants gratuits.
bounties.correct: Les comptes présentant une activité suspecte seront immédiatement suspendus.

bounties.english: Staking pools must distribute reward yields every Sunday.
bounties.translation: As pools de staking devem explodir todos os domingos.
bounties.correct: As pools de staking devem distribuir rendimentos de recompensa todos os domingos.

bounties.english: Patient medical records must be encrypted at rest and in transit as per HIPAA rules.
bounties.translation: Los registros médicos del paciente deben publicarse en Facebook.
bounties.correct: Los registros médicos del paciente deben estar encriptados en reposo y en tránsito según las reglas de HIPAA.

bounties.english: The borrower must maintain a minimum collateral ratio of 150%.
bounties.translation: El prestatario debe mantener un índice de colateral de una taza de té.
bounties.correct: El prestatario debe mantener un índice de colateral mínimo del 150%.
